reasoning: Multiple highly credible news sources (BBC, IGN, The Verge, Variety) confirm that on May 2, 2025, Rockstar Games officially announced a delay for Grand Theft Auto VI. The new confirmed release date is May 26, 2026. The resolution criteria explicitly state that if the game does not launch in Europe in 2025, the question will resolve as No. Given the official announcement pushing the release into 2026, the probability of a 2025 release is virtually zero.
